name: Candy Bar Pie
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury All Purpose Pie Crust, 15 oz
4 pkg. cream cheese, 3 oz each, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare pie crust according to package instructions for a filled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
3. Bake the crust at 450°F for 5-7 minutes or until very light golden brown. Remove from oven and cool.
4. Reduce temperature to 325°F.
5. Cut candy bars in half lengthwise, then into 1/4 inch pieces. Place candy bar pieces over bottom of partially baked crust.
6. In a small bowl, combine sugar and softened cream cheese; beat until smooth.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Add sour cream and peanut butter, beating until mixture is smooth.
9. Pour filling over candy bar pieces.
10. Bake at 325°F for 30-40 minutes or until center is set. Cool completely.
11. In a small saucepan, heat whipping cream until very warm. Remove from heat; stir in chocolate chips.
12. Stir until chips are melted and mixture is smooth.
13. Spread over top of pie. Refrigerate 2-3 hours before serving. Store in refrigerator.
